meaning: Virginia Military Institute (美国)弗吉尼亚军事学院
examples: The format of the VMI is important for compatibility reasons, and I'll return to this topic shortly.
The VMI relies on a compatible hypervisor and potentially some configuration of the hypervisor's device emulation, but the focus remains on the application.
The file is typically in a compressed format—specifically, the file grows and shrinks with the contents of the VMI and is not defined by the capacity of the VM's hard disk.
Some memos he wrote caught the eye of Army Chief of Staff (and VMI alumnus) George Marshall, who brought him on staff.
They got to the championship by defeating Winthrop in the tournament opener and rallied from 5 points down at the half to oust VMI, 71-65.
